title: Buttery Crumble Marshmallow Treats
description: A sweet and gooey dessert made with buttery crumble and marshmallow treats. Perfect for a quick snack or dessert.
instructions: 2. In a medium bowl, mix together the melted butter and buttery crumble.
3. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9x9 inch baking dish.
4. Melt the marshmallows in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
5. Pour the melted marshmallows over the buttery crumble mixture.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing into bars.
